column2: taxon name from the original source file
scientific or common name (we can accommodate either; common names will be translated to scientific names during the 'taxa translate' step)

TaxaID_orig translated to an ID that is used for the Lower Boise River fish BCG (version 1) metric calculations. It harmonizes differences such as syntax, changes in nomenclature, misspellings, etc. DNI = not included.
yes = Taxon_orig is different from the OTU_BCG_v1; no = TaxaID_orig is the same as the OTU_BCG_v1
reason for modifying OTU_BCG_v1 (e.g., formatting, spelling)
same as OTU_BCG_v1 except non-target taxa (DNIs) are included (where appropriate)
